chapter_title.en: Punishment of enmity with Amirul Momineen (a.s.) and denying or doubting his Wilayat

text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ لَمْ یَعْرِفْ سُوءَ مَا أُوتِیَ إِلَیْنَا مِنْ ظُلْمِنَا وَ ذَهَابِ حَقِّنَا وَ مَا نُکِبْنَا بِهِ فَهُوَ شَرِیکُ مَنْ أَبَی إِلَیْنَا فِیمَا وَلَّیْنَاهُ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 6. And from the previous chain from Abdillah b. ’Amru b. Shimr from Jabir from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who is unaware of misbehavior and injustice to us and usurpation of our rights and does not think of them as wrong deeds, is a supporter of those who oppress us.”
